3	Stefan Georgi
BONUS 6	Video 2 - Mini Sales Letter - Turmeric
Writing Mini Sales Letters
VIDEO 2
Mini Sales Letter - Turmeric
(00:00)
All right. So going back to mini sales letters, this one is one that a friend wrote
that I don’t think it went live, but he said I could use it as an example so I am.
You’ll see this one’s not going to have a ton of a lead and I think maybe there
could have been a few more lines, which we’ll go over in a second. It follows
the background story and the unique mechanism stuff very closely and then
follows a lot of this besides the lead and again, it’s 1,200-ish words.
(00:35)
“99-year-old yogi from India reveals her secret to living “pain-free.” Vinda Patel
from India is one of the oldest yoga teachers alive. At 99 years old, she can
perform the toughest yoga poses with ease. How does she stay so flexible
without stiffness or pain? In a recent interview she shared her secret. “It’s
truly a blessing that I can stay so loose and pain-free at 99 years old. I credit
this all on something I call my “golden life staple,” thank God I found it. The
story of how I discovered this secret is near and dear to my heart and now I
want to share it with you.”
(01:02)
We do have the promises; being pain-free at any age. We do actually tease
the mechanism with the Gordon life staple. There is curiosity. We do tease
an emotional discovery story. We don’t really call out the pain point. I mean,
he’s talking about stiffness and pain so maybe we do a little bit. We do have
a promise to the solution. It’s not really a fascination, except for that again,
99-year-old yogi who’s pain-free is its own thing. It doesn’t really address
skepticism. The fact that it was an interview is a credibility builder. It’s an
inherent qualifier that if this works for a 99-year-old woman, it will work for
you, too and there are no testimonials. Actually, even though it’s just this little
part here, it actually does check a lot of these boxes. Now let’s go into the
background story.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 11 --

4	Stefan Georgi
BONUS 6	Video 2 - Mini Sales Letter - Turmeric
(01:57)
“At 58 years old, Vinda had a terrible accident that left her bedridden for months.
She broke her neck, both of her legs and hurt her back badly. She survived, but
doctors said she’d never be able to do yoga again. When Vinda’s bones finally
healed, the lingering pain never went away. “When I had my accident, I thought
I’d never do yoga again. Even though I healed, my joints were always in pain
and I was totally stiff. It hurt to even walk up the stairs. But I was determined
to find something that could help me at all costs.”
(02:19)
Vinda was just like you. She was in pain, she had an accident; she was
determined to find a solution. She needed to find something that could relieve
her pain and give her back her life, so searching for solutions here.
(02:39)
“At first, she found small relief with modern drugs like ibuprofen but soon,
she refused to use them. “Doctors told me if I kept using NSAIDS for my
pain, I risked kidney and liver failure. Since I value my body’s health more
than anything, I stopped using them.” No other remedies doctors suggested
seemed to work at all. Vinda knew she needed to find a powerful, natural
remedy better than ibuprofen without the risky side side effects. She walked
her small Indian town in pain, speaking to farmers, storeowners, and more.”
(03:03)
So she’s now on a search for truth. She said she wasn’t used to doctors anymore.
That was the trigger thing; the traditional solutions weren’t working for her.
(03:14)
“She was looking for a glimmer of hope that someone may know how to help
her. Still, not one person knew what to tell her. Finally, by a stroke of luck, she
met someone that would save her life.” Now we get to the optional “meets
wise sensei” thing.
(03:23)
“In a small town close to hers, she ran into a traditional Indian healer. The
rumor was that he had successfully helped over 100,000 people with his
remedies. He looked like he was in a rush to leave town, but Vinda grabbed
him just in time. Vinda quickly told him about her tragedy, and how her pain
had never gone away. She said she would try anything if it meant she could
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 11 --

5	Stefan Georgi
BONUS 6	Video 2 - Mini Sales Letter - Turmeric
have her pain-free life back. She just needed to get to the root of the problem.
Why was her pain not going away? Here’s what the healer told her: “The reason
for ongoing pain usually ties back to one thing - chronic inflammation. Now,
chronic inflammation is mainly caused by one thing I call the “pain protein.” It’s
called NF-kB and the overproduction of this “pain protein” can cause chronic,
burning inflammation and pain.”
(04:04)
That’s the unique mechanism of the problem. I think this part is my least
favorite part, because I don’t think that it’s realistic that the healer would talk
to her like that, so it can be done differently and better. But regardless, it is the
mechanism of the problem.
(04:18)
“He told Vinda that the key to relieving her pain would be to inhibit this protein.
Thankfully, he had just a thing for that. The healer said that there was one
“natural remedy” that would solve her problem. It was natural and it would
bring soothing relief, and most likely give her her life back. He said the remedy
is usually extremely expensive. He gave it to her at a steep discount because
he felt for her pain. She agreed, so he made the remedy for her from scratch.
He carefully measured a strange golden powder and he mixed it with what
looked like a black spice. Then, the healer gave her instructions, “Take two
pinches of this mixture twice a day with breakfast. Keep doing this once a day,
and report back in 7 days.”
(04:52)
So mechanism of the solution is really just to target what the problem was. It
could be a little bit clearer in here as well. But now we’re getting to the product
buildup and reveal; he gave her the solution, this powder.
(05:06)
“In desperation, Vinda did everything the healer said. After day one of using
the remedy, Vinda was already in awe. She could already feel her stiff, burning
joints loosen up and feel much better. After 7 days, Vinda nervously tried to
do something crazy. She attempted to do one of her favorite yoga poses and
she succeeded. She cried tears of joy. The stiffness, the joint pain - it was all
gone. “The remedy worked better than ibuprofen for my inflammation. I was
amazed. The best part is, it’s natural. I did not have to worry about the risky
side effects.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 11 --

6	Stefan Georgi
BONUS 6	Video 2 - Mini Sales Letter - Turmeric
(05:31)
What was this miracle powder that the healer had given her? Vinda caught up
with the healer after 7 days, as he requested. She asked him what the secret
remedy was, she needed to make it herself. The healer shared with her the
secret. “I call the golden powder Haldi, also known as turmeric. The one I use
is a special type with 95% curcumin, the active ingredient that makes it work
so well. Also, my mixture includes a rare black pepper extract. This increases
absorption by 2000 times and without it, it will not work.”
(05:57)
For Vinda to find the right ingredients in a mixture that would work well would
have cost her hundreds of dollars and it would have taken hours each week.
The premium turmeric that the healer used and the black pepper extract are
not easy to come by. Thankfully, she stumbled upon a small USA company that
also knew the healer’s secret. The company was developing a cost-effective
way to deliver this remedy to anyone who wants it. They developed a capsule
that includes the same ingredients that the healer gave Vinda. All you need
to do is take two capsules once a day at breakfast, like the healer instructed
Vinda, to experience the same benefits that she did.”
(06:28)
Testing it out, it’s working, eventual success. Not really others asking for it,
but also out-of-the-box wouldn’t work. You’ll just use any type of turmeric. She
had to use a special type and basically, finally she finds a company. Others
are not asking for it, but she finds a company that has it and product is going
to be born.
(06:52)
“It’s called “Max Absorption Turmeric with BioPerine.” This world-class solution
is made with 1,300 milligrams of 100% organic turmeric. It even includes
the “black spice” the healer mentioned in the form of patented “BioPerine.”
This combination together offers a natural remedy that can relieve pain and
stiffness, and give you the life you want. The company is so confident in their
product that they offer a 6-month 100% money-back guarantee. No questions
asked.
(07:16)
When word of this breakthrough formula got out, demand exploded. The
company sold out for months. Thankfully, the company got more in stock to
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 11 --

7	Stefan Georgi
BONUS 6	Video 2 - Mini Sales Letter - Turmeric
start 2019. However, they expect this batch to sell out extremely quickly and it
won’t be until June 2019 when it’s back in stock. Due to how hard it is to sources
this high quality, rare ingredients” - should probably be these high quality. Again,
I didn’t write this. High quality, rare ingredients. “Back in stock due to how hard
it is to source these high quality, rare ingredients.
(07:41)
Now the company’s offering a 41% discount to promote natural health, and
they set up a special site for you to claim this discount. Last time we checked,
the company only has a couple of hundred bottles left, and they are going
fast. The most popular options are 3 or 6-month supply because it’s the best
way to receive the ongoing benefits that Vinda did and so that you could stock
up before the company sells out. It’s a no brainer at less than a $1.50 a day.
Remember, the company has a 6-month money-back guarantee. So this is 100%
risk-free offer. And just remember, it’s a heck of a lot safer than mainstream
remedies like ibuprofen, and it’s proven to be better in many regards. Click the
link above to “Get Yours” and relieve pain and get your life back. Good luck.”
(08:18)
All right. For this one, what do we have? We have the product details, we have
dismiss alternatives; it’s safer than remedies like ibuprofen. We build up the
value a bit. We don’t have testimonials in it. We do have how to use it; “take two
capsules a day” is in the sales letter. It’s above the close a little bit. Demand is
high, supplies are limited, out-of-stocks are common is definitely there. They
look at it as a personal mission. It’s not super deep, but they promote natural
health. Price justification is not super strong, but we do talk about the $1.50,
so it makes it more of a bargain. The call-to-action really, just one call-to-action
at the very end, but you do have the idea of smart people buy more. “Most
popular options are 3 or 6-month supply.” You have the guarantee mentioned
twice. You don’t have the two choices, but you do have little, “You need to act
fast” again type stuff and then there’s no FAQs, but there could have been
FAQ for this one.
(09:34)
But still, if you look at this example and the other example, you can see how
really a lot of the stuff is still being done here. Again, these are very short. So I
hope that helps. I think it should help. It’s valuable, my opinion and hope that is
something you find valuable.
